_comment: All thresholds and hyperparameters for the Relevant Priors pipeline. Edit here — no hard-coded values in inference or training code.
_sklearn_threshold_note: Decision boundary for logistic regression (0-1). Lower = more recalls, higher = more precision. Tuned for 23.8% positive base rate.
_onnx_threshold_note: Decision boundary for ONNX+sklearn ensemble average (0-1).
_uncertainty_note: sklearn predictions in [low, high] are sent to ONNX for ensemble. Outside this range sklearn alone decides.
_tfidf_note: TF-IDF vectoriser settings. token_pattern [A-Z0-9]+ is set in code (not configurable here).
_lr_note: Logistic regression hyperparameters. class_weight=balanced accounts for 23.8% positive base rate.
_lookup_note: Minimum number of times a (cur_desc, pri_desc) pair must appear exclusively as true/false to be included in the lookup table.
_onnx_inference_note: Batch size and max token length for ONNX inference.
